'''yobawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:spadish|spadish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-b-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:spadish|spadish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yobawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yobawithi|yobawithi]] || [[word:yobawiji|yobawiji]] || [[word:yobawishi|yobawishi]] || [[word:yobawiki|yobawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yobawuthuthu|yobawuthuthu]] || [[word:yobawujuju|yobawujuju]] || [[word:yobawushushu|yobawushushu]] || [[word:yobawukuku|yobawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yobawuthu|yobawuthu]] || [[word:yobawuju|yobawuju]] || [[word:yobawushu|yobawushu]] || [[word:yobawuku|yobawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yobawufthuf|yobawufthuf]] || [[word:yobawufjuf|yobawufjuf]] || [[word:yobawufshuf|yobawufshuf]] || [[word:yobawufkuf|yobawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yobawethe|yobawethe]] || [[word:yobaweje|yobaweje]] || [[word:yobaweshe|yobaweshe]] || [[word:yobaweke|yobaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yobawothotho|yobawothotho]] || [[word:yobawojojo|yobawojojo]] || [[word:yobawoshosho|yobawoshosho]] || [[word:yobawokoko|yobawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yobawotho|yobawotho]] || [[word:yobawojo|yobawojo]] || [[word:yobawosho|yobawosho]] || [[word:yobawoko|yobawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yobawofthof|yobawofthof]] || [[word:yobawofjof|yobawofjof]] || [[word:yobawofshof|yobawofshof]] || [[word:yobawofkof|yobawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yobawÃŸfthÃŸf|yobawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yobawÃŸfjÃŸf|yobawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yobawÃŸfshÃŸf|yobawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yobawÃŸfkÃŸf|yobawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yobawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|yobawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yobawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|yobawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yobawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|yobawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yobawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|yobawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yobawÃŸfthÃŸf|yobawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yobawÃŸfjÃŸf|yobawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yobawÃŸfshÃŸf|yobawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yobawÃŸfkÃŸf|yobawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yobawÃŸfthÃŸf|yobawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yobawÃŸfjÃŸf|yobawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yobawÃŸfshÃŸf|yobawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yobawÃŸfkÃŸf|yobawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yobawÃḊthÃḊ|yobawÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:yobawÃḊjÃḊ|yobawÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:yobawÃḊshÃḊ|yobawÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:yobawÃḊkÃḊ|yobawÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yobawathatha|yobawathatha]] || [[word:yobawajaja|yobawajaja]] || [[word:yobawashasha|yobawashasha]] || [[word:yobawakaka|yobawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yobawatha|yobawatha]] || [[word:yobawaja|yobawaja]] || [[word:yobawasha|yobawasha]] || [[word:yobawaka|yobawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yobawafthaf|yobawafthaf]] || [[word:yobawafjaf|yobawafjaf]] || [[word:yobawafshaf|yobawafshaf]] || [[word:yobawafkaf|yobawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yobawasha|yobawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yobawshÃḋsha|yobawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yobawrosha|yobawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yobawmusha|yobawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yobawyasha|yobawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyobawnkshÃḋsha|goyobawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyobawnkrosha|goyobawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyobawnkmusha|goyobawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyobawnkyasha|goyobawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yobabawasha|yobabawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yobabawshÃḋsha|yobabawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yobabawrosha|yobabawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yobabawmusha|yobabawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yobabawyasha|yobabawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyobabawnkshÃḋsha|goyobabawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyobabawnkrosha|goyobabawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyobabawnkmusha|goyobabawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyobabawnkyasha|goyobabawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yebÃḊwasha|yebÃḊwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yebÃḊwshÃḋsha|yebÃḊwshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yebÃḊwrosha|yebÃḊwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yebÃḊwmusha|yebÃḊwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yebÃḊwyasha|yebÃḊwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyebÃḊwnkshÃḋsha|goyebÃḊwnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyebÃḊwnkrosha|goyebÃḊwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyebÃḊwnkmusha|goyebÃḊwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyebÃḊwnkyasha|goyebÃḊwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yobfawasha|yobfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yobfawshÃḋsha|yobfawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yobfawrosha|yobfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yobfawmusha|yobfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yobfawyasha|yobfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyobfawnkshÃḋsha|goyobfawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyobfawnkrosha|goyobfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyobfawnkmusha|goyobfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyobfawnkyasha|goyobfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
